scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,gateway "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/protocol && npm run build --workspace apps/gateway && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace packages/protocol && vitest run
scripts.test:e2e: playwright install chromium && playwright test && node scripts/sanitize-next-env.mjs
